results.title: Modern Glitch and Cinematic Video Transitions Pack, Elements ft. davinci resolve transition & sports transitions - Envato
excerpts: This comprehensive video template offers a diverse collection of dynamic transitions, including modern cuts, glitch effects, cinematic movements, and various motion distortions like blur, pixel, and rotation. Designed for seamless integration into video projects, these drag-and-drop transitions come with customizable settings to fine-tune each effect.

results.title: Best free effects, templates, and plugins made for DaVinci Resolve 19 | EasyEdit
excerpts:
Section Title: Best free effects, templates, and plugins made for DaVinci Resolve 19 > Reactor 3
Content:
You can find dozens of scripts and tools in one place - inside the open-source, free-of-cost package manager Reactor 3 !
It works in the way that creators upload their plugins to the manager and you can download any chosen one for free(though some creators accept donations). To do this, download Reactor 3 to your PC and open DaVinci Resolve. Go to Workspace>Console and drag the downloaded file to the window.
After that, just reload Resolve and select the Scripts option from the list - here you’ll be able to select and install any plugin you need to Fusion or DaVinci.
